title: Address Before the Young Men's Lyceum of Springfield, Illinois
source_edition: Project Gutenberg EBook #3253, extracted from The Papers and Writings of Abraham Lincoln, Complete, Constitutional Edition, ed. Arthur Brooks Lapsley
editorial_status: public-domain transcription with Gutenberg header/footer stripped; Lapsley date error retained in body but corrected in metadata
inclusion_rationale: Early benchmark for Lincoln on political institutions, inherited republican obligation, law, mob violence, and the transition from revolutionary memory to civic reverence.
known_limitations: Gutenberg/Lapsley transcription is adequate for pilot annotation but should be cross-checked against Basler before publication-level quotation.

title: Address Delivered at the Dedication of the Cemetery at Gettysburg
source_edition: Project Gutenberg EBook #4, Bliss copy transcription
editorial_status: public-domain Bliss copy transcription with Gutenberg header/footer stripped
inclusion_rationale: Canonical sacrificial-economy text for battlefield death, national survival, dedication, consecration, unfinished work, and new birth of freedom.
known_limitations: The Bliss copy is used for pilot consistency; variant manuscript wording should be checked before claims depend on exact phrasing.

title: Second Inaugural Address
source_edition: Project Gutenberg EBook #8, Abraham Lincoln's Second Inaugural Address
editorial_status: public-domain transcription with Gutenberg header/footer stripped
inclusion_rationale: Central final-war text for Providence, oath, Union, shared guilt, blood repayment, judgment, reconciliation, and healing language.
known_limitations: Reliable for pilot annotation; manuscript cross-check remains required before publication-level quotation.
